violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment placed service call. Establishment is using three bay sink to sanitize dishes. Establishment is to sanitize all dish/cook ware previously put through dish machine. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the stand up refrigeration units in the kitchen. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food Contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The seems of the floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026
Ceiling tiles in the dining area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen and on the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The floor seem by the grill cook line area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
